paper_title: Geological Mapping and Analysis of the Burgalesa Platform

methods.description: This method involves the collection of structural and sedimentary data through field campaigns and the integration of various data sources to map geological features of the Burgalesa Platform.

steps.description: A Digital Terrain Model (DTM) with a resolution of 1 m / pixel, obtained from LiDAR data, provided by the Instituto Geográfico Nacional (IGN) of the Spanish Government, was overprinted in the geological map to represent the topography.
steps.searchable_summary: integrate LiDAR data into geological map for topography representation

steps.description: Several field campaigns were carried out during a year period for collecting structural data and mapping different sedimentary units.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct field campaigns to collect structural and sedimentary data

steps.description: Redefine and remap previously defined tectonic and sedimentological features using field data, previous geological maps, and remote sensing data.
steps.searchable_summary: update tectonic and sedimentological maps using field and remote sensing data

steps.description: Unify stratigraphical units of Miocene age from two different foreland basins to simplify the stratigraphy of the area.
steps.searchable_summary: simplify stratigraphy by unifying Miocene stratigraphical units

steps.description: Geo-reference all collected data in an ArcGIS project.

methods.method_name: Orientation Analysis of Rivers and Lineaments
methods.description: This method involves analyzing the orientation of rivers and lineaments using Rock-Works software to generate rose diagrams.

steps.description: Perform orientation analysis of rivers and lineaments using Rock-Works 15 software, utilizing the rose diagram command in Linears analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze orientation of rivers and lineaments using Rock-Works

steps.description: Plot rose diagrams representing frequency and length of river and lineament segments oriented in 15° intervals.
steps.searchable_summary: plot rose diagrams for river and lineament orientation
